reviews.review_description: I see the globe.  I say play.  The only card i see is dragonic supremacy.  The evil soldier advance and there is nothing i can do. They destroy the castle. That is it.  Cant Play anything.

reviews.review_title: An addictive Tower Defense game, enjoy.
reviews.review_description: An addictive Tower Defense game, enjoy.

developer_response.body: Dear Dan, thank you very much for your valuable suggestions. I would like to point out that the game is still under development. The changes you mentioned are very important to us and we will implement them in the next update. Thank you very much for your understanding. I would be very grateful if you could re-evaluate the rating after the update.
